title: Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS)
description: Assessment of the impact of psychological problems on daily functioning and social adjustment.
author: Mundt et al.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.text: Rate on a scale from 0 (not at all) to 8 (very severely) how much your problem impairs your ability to carry out each of the following activities.

questions.text: Because of my problem, my ability to work is impaired.
Because of my problem, my ability to manage home tasks is impaired.
Because of my problem, my social leisure activities are impaired.
Because of my problem, my private leisure activities are impaired.
Because of my problem, my ability to form and maintain close relationships is impaired.
